description: This file implements an in-memory workflow service with functions to create, transition, start, cancel, fail, succeed, and retrieve workflows, including a state machine enforcing allowed transitions and status updates.

methods.name: createWorkflow
methods.description: Creates a new workflow record with initial status 'queued' and default steps.

methods.name: transitionWorkflow
methods.description: Transitions a workflow to a new status, enforcing allowed state transitions.

methods.name: startWorkflow
methods.description: Simulates starting a workflow, progressing through predefined steps with delays.

methods.name: cancelWorkflow
methods.description: Cancels a workflow if it is not already completed.

methods.name: failWorkflow
methods.description: Marks a workflow as failed, optionally with additional details.

methods.name: getWorkflow
methods.description: Retrieves a workflow record by ID.

methods.name: getWorkflowStatus
methods.description: Provides a polling-friendly status projection of a workflow.
